examples: Dogs may be man's best friend, but babies might also really understand Fido.
Epidemiology studies also undermine the desire to believe that Fido would never turn on us.
One hot day, after dinner, his master was sleeping in a summer-house, with Fido by his side.
But he'd consider complementing his ten-dog force with Fido sensors if the price were right.
What self-respecting art collector would hang a portrait of Fido next to a Picasso?
